title: buildah security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.41.8-2.0.1]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117178]

[2:1.41.8-2]
- Rebuild with golang 1.25.7 to fix CVE-2025-68121
- Resolves: RHEL-149617
full_text:
[1.41.8-2.0.1]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117178]

[2:1.41.8-2]
- Rebuild with golang 1.25.7 to fix CVE-2025-68121
- Resolves: RHEL-149617
